nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘I am exceedingly jealous for Zion, yes, with great wrath I am jealous for her.’

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts: I am jealous for Zion with great jealousy, and I am jealous for her with great wrath.

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘我十分熱愛錫安；我為錫安大發烈怒。’

ccb.text: “万军之耶和华说，‘我对锡安充满了火热的爱，我为锡安而大发烈怒。
